summary_en: 34,000 shares (3.26% of outstanding shares), ¥510M upper limit, ToSTNeT-3 method, Jul 1 – Dec 31, 2026.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Acquisition of Treasury Shares
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, the board of directors of IWABUCHI CORPORATION resolved to acquire treasury shares pursuant to the Companies Act. The company will acquire up to 34,000 ordinary shares (3.26% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total consideration of ¥510M. The acquisition will be conducted via ToSTNeT-3 (off-auction market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange) during the period from 1 July 2026 through 31 December 2026. The company cited shareholder returns and capital efficiency improvements as the rationale for the program.
